item.title: And btw all the candidates on the stage last night couldn’t recognize the g*nocide for what it is
item.description:
And btw all the candidates on the stage last night couldn’t recognize the g*nocide for what it is. Shame on them all, shame on the Democrat party, and shame every single Zionist ever single chance u get.

item.title: I’ve yet to hear a single cogent way this could economically harm anyone other than Patagonia, this is not a precidential case a...
item.description:
I’ve yet to hear a single cogent way this could economically harm anyone other than Patagonia, this is not a precidential case at least not from the complaint filed. That is flagrant corporate propaganda pls get a life.

item.title: If y’all don’t want me to point out the war crimes of the Democrats, you should stop lying about them because yes they wouldn’t ...
item.description:
If y’all don’t want me to point out the war crimes of the Democrats, you should stop lying about them because yes they wouldn’t be the same but the difference between them wouldn’t it be substantially saving lives, it would be lying about the lives they cost#greenscreenvideo final disclaimer: i voted for Harris, i lived in a state that had a 0 percent chance of flipping so my vote had literally 0 impact. Don’t get in my comments yapping about leftists not doing enough.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
